testcase.name: Add element
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Add element # src/test/java/features/add_remove.feature:3 Given I open the Add Remove Elements page # steps.AddRemoveSteps.openPage() When I click the Add Element button # steps.AddRemoveSteps.clickAdd() Then I should see the Delete button # steps.AddRemoveSteps.verifyDelete()
testcase.system-err: Mar 15, 2026 4:29:11 AM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 146 Mar 15, 2026 4:29:11 AM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 146.0.7680.80. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.21.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's. testcase.name: Select checkbox
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Select checkbox # src/test/java/features/checkbox.feature:3 Given I open the Checkboxes page # steps.CheckboxSteps.openPage() When I select the first checkbox # steps.CheckboxSteps.selectCheckbox() Then the first checkbox should be selected # steps.CheckboxSteps.verifyCheckbox()

testcase.name: Select option from dropdown
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Select option from dropdown # src/test/java/features/dropdown.feature:3 Given I open the Dropdown page # steps.DropdownSteps.openPage() When I select Option 1 # steps.DropdownSteps.selectOption() Then Option 1 should be selected # steps.DropdownSteps.verifyOption()

testcase.name: Search for a term
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Search for a term # src/test/java/features/google_search.feature:3 Given I am on the Google search page # steps.SearchSteps.openGoogle() When I search for "GitHub" # steps.SearchSteps.search(java.lang.String) Then I should see "GitHub" in the results # steps.SearchSteps.verify(java.lang.String)
